title: Just Enough Recipe Integrations
description: Adds JEI Supports to Mods Without It
body:
Adds JEI support for mods that don't have their own.

Dynamically loads support based on the mods installed so you can use it if you only have one installed.

Currently supported mods:

<details>
<summary> 1.12: </summary>

##### Animania Farm

Cheese Mold

##### Bibliocraft

Printing Press

Typesetting Table

Typewriter

##### Fish's Undead Rising

Intestines Loot Table

Anvil Enchanting Recipes

##### MrCrayfish's Furniture Mod

Computer

Oven

Freezer

Printer

Toaster

Cutting Board

Blender

Dishwasher

Washing Machine

Microwave

Grill

##### MrCrayfish's Gun Mod

Gun Workbench

##### Ultimate Car Mod

Oil Mill

Blast Funace

Backmix Reactor

Split Tank

</details>


<details>
<summary> Future Plans: </summary>

Ultimate Car Mod Car Workshop

Extended IndustrialCraft 2 Support

Botanic Additions Gaia Agglomeration Plate
</details>
